stemHtml: The function of an accumulator in a hydraulic brake system is to…

options.a: function as a buffer to assist the hydraulic system during heavy braking and act as a power source for emergency undercarriage lowering.
options.b: supply a limited amount of brake energy in the event of failure of the hydraulic system(s) which are normally supplying the brake system.
options.c: reduce pressure fluctuations of the auto-brake system.
options.d: store the hydraulic energy recovered by the anti-skid system when preventing the wheels from locking.
